Full Stack Developer focused on scalable systems, product engineering, and useful software.

I build backend systems, internal platforms, and API-driven products with a strong bias toward reliability, maintainability, and clean execution.

view github() open blog()
$ npm run current-focus > architect scalable services > ship internal platforms > build open-source tools > improve operational reliability
Primary Backend architecture & APIs
Secondary Frontend delivery & UX practicality
Infra Docker, Linux, CI/CD
Timezone Bali, Indonesia (WITA)

about.ts

Full stack, system, and product engineering focus across architecture, implementation, and operations.

I work across architecture, implementation, deployment, and long-term maintenance. My background sits between backend engineering, product thinking, and operations.

Most of my work centers on scalable services, API-driven systems, internal tooling, and software that stays useful in production.

export const strengths = { backendArchitecture: true, apiDrivenSystems: true, frontendImplementation: true, productThinking: true, operationalReliability: true, };

skills.json

languages: ["Go", "PHP", "Node.js", "Ruby", "Dart"] frontend: ["HTML5", "CSS3", "JavaScript", "Flutter", "Blade", "Livewire"] backend: ["Laravel", "REST", "gRPC", "TCP client-server"] databases: ["MySQL", "PostgreSQL", "InfluxDB"] devops: ["Docker", "Linux", "CI/CD", "Git"]

experience.ts

Roles spanning software development, systems analysis, and product-oriented engineering.

System & Product Engineer

PT Produk Internet Revolusioner • Jan 2023 — Present

Architected, developed, and maintained scalable backend services and internal web platforms using Laravel, Filament, and API-centric design. Worked closely with product, network, and operations teams to deliver reliable systems aligned with long-term product strategy.

HomeNet Analyst

PT Jinom Network Indonesia • Sep 2021 — Jan 2023

Analyzed system and product requirements for managed internet services, formalized operational needs into technical specifications, and supported monitoring, reporting, and service reliability improvements.

Software Programmer

PT Jinom Network Indonesia • Sep 2019 — Sep 2021

Developed and maintained web applications and internal systems, including backend features, integrations, data processing workflows, maintenance, debugging, refactoring, and production performance optimization.

timeline.log

2019 -> software programmer 2021 -> homenet analyst 2023 -> system & product engineer now -> scalable systems + internal platforms + OSS

projects.ts

Open-source work and engineering projects centered on maintainability, usability, and system design.

Open Source • FilamentPHP

Filament Swiper

Touch-friendly slider component for FilamentPHP, built to bring smoother mobile interaction into admin panels.

role: creator + maintainer focus: mobile UX / admin interfaces
view repository →
Open Source • FilamentPHP

Filament Announce

Announcement module for FilamentPHP to deliver product updates and important notices with minimal integration overhead.

role: creator + maintainer focus: internal communication / product UX
view repository →
Open Source • UI Component

Filament Slider

Flexible slider input for numeric and range-based forms, designed to improve precision and overall form usability.

role: creator + maintainer focus: form UX / reusable component
view repository →
Open Source • Backend Architecture

Filament API Service

Service abstraction layer for API-driven Filament resources, built to support cleaner, more maintainable service-oriented backend design.

role: creator + maintainer focus: API architecture / maintainability
view repository →
Automation • Operations

Remote Database Backup

Automated remote backup system designed for scheduled execution, external storage, and safer database operations.

role: designer + implementer focus: resilience / operational safety
view repository →
Engineering Approach

System-minded delivery

My work usually sits between product, engineering, and operations, with an emphasis on systems that are practical to run, maintain, and extend.

theme: useful / stable / maintainable
see more on github →
